## Verification

<!-- List exact commands and results. Explain any check not run. -->

- [ ] Focused tests pass.
- [ ] `make test` passes, or this PR explains why it is not applicable.
- [ ] Visible TUI changes include screenshots at relevant narrow/wide sizes.
- [ ] User-facing copy is localized in every affected catalog.
- [ ] Lesson changes have executable evidence, independent agent review, and refreshed manifest hashes.
- [ ] No tokens, private prompts, local data, answer keys, or unrelated generated files are included.
